name: Z-SUSBV-O
purpose: Central hub validation of per-project benchmark capsules against registry, entitlement posture, and evidence metadata — no live research, no price changes.
spiral_scout_role: Z-Spiral Scout — internal future governed research/scout minibot; collects benchmark evidence only after approval; never changes prices autonomously.

minibot_family.label: Benchmark Evidence Bot
minibot_family.role: Source links, comp rows, freshness checks in metadata

minibot_family.label: Zuno Verdict Bot
minibot_family.role: GREEN / YELLOW / RED / BLUE posture line

standards_alignment_note: Readiness-aligned with ISO/IEC 42001:2023, NIST AI RMF, and WCAG 2.2 themes — not official certification unless separately audited.
golden_law: AMK/human decides pricing, launch, and service access
traffic_link: Signals from Z-Traffic may consume overseer report paths as metadata only — no auto-exec.
amk_map_link: AMK-MAP dashboard may link overseer receipts as read-only orientation.
